conclusion: Sigma_1^bulk < 1 on the certified q* bracket; 1 - Sigma_1^bulk has no zero in |q| <= 1/2 (winding 0), so the bulk resolvent is holomorphic there; the bulk singularity q_b is real with certified digits and exceeds 1/2. The travel pole q* is the dominant singularity of the assembled relaxed series V.
